title: P4: heltec procpu.dts uart1 comment could reference the specific bd issue fixed (g38y) and note that uart1 is now always enabled
description: The updated comment is improved but still could be tighter. Reference the codereview bead project-LICHEN-g38y. Also check if aliases should include serial0 = &uart1 or similar for consistency with other boards. Fix as real work.
